name: Wearable Capture Core
description: Reusable engine that turns any polling wearable (Omi, Limitless, and future devices) into Open Brain thoughts as ATOMS — title, action items, transcript chunks — each tagged with provenance (attribution / attributed_to / generator) and deduped on a salted per-atom fingerprint. Per-device adapters implement a five-method interface; the core owns auth, atom dedup, embedding, and writes.
